description: Plugin-distributed hooks for marketing-operations-demand-gen. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags marketing ops anti-patterns (missing UTM convention, attribution claim without a named model, hard-coded conversion-rate/CAC figure without a date, email send without consent/suppression note). Set MARKETING_OPS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
